title: Awakening to the Living Burden
situation: Koden Bushi Bloodflower receives the Mystical Cuatro and realizes it is not an instrument but a living omen that must be delivered through ritual.
knows: The Mystical Cuatro is animate and symbolically charged
His role is a messenger bound to ritual consequence
Deliveries are acts of fate, not exchange
does_not_know: What specific transformation each delivery will trigger
Whether the burden can ever be set down
